metadata.description: Open-source brand skills that turn an idea into a real brand — name, identity, voice & brand book — without leaving your AI agent. Works in Claude Code, Cursor & 70+ agents.

plugins.name: brand-skills
plugins.description: 15 brand-genesis skills with a persistence layer: brand-init builds a structured, queryable brand package (brand.yaml + folder) every other skill reads and writes into — metaphor-driven naming, brand context, strategy, architecture, identity, voice, story, positioning, messaging, target audience, competitor branding, guidelines (brand book), audit, and rebranding. Brand creation only — no go-to-market.
